description_long: This object is a modular fence system composed of several segments, each featuring a brick-like pattern on the surface, suggesting a masonry or concrete block construction. The main section is a rectangular wall with a perpendicular return at one end, likely for corner or end support, and is accompanied by a matching post and two shorter wall segments. The surface is uniformly textured with horizontal and vertical lines to mimic the appearance of laid bricks. The top edges of all segments are flat and smooth, with the posts capped by a slightly protruding flat slab. The color is a uniform light gray, giving it a neutral, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments. There are no visible decorative elements or openings, and the structure appears solid and robust.
description: A modular, light gray fence system with a brick-patterned surface and flat-topped posts, designed for urban settings. The segments are solid and utilitarian, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing all fence segments, including the main wall with a perpendicular return, a post, and two shorter wall sections, all with a brick pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the main wall and the perpendicular return, with the post and shorter segments aligned behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back faces of the fence segments, mirroring the brick pattern and flat tops.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the perpendicular return from the other side and the alignment of the post and shorter segments.
